name: golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev
title: golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev
summary: implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr (lib)
description:
implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr (lib)
This package implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr
package (see also https://github.com/go-logr/logr), in terms of Go's standard
log package.
